proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs between patients with treatment_tamoxifen=1 and treatment_tamoxifen=0 in the full cohort.
Mean pfs_months differs between patients with treatment_palbociclib=1 and treatment_palbociclib=0 in the full cohort.
Mean pfs_months differs between patients with treatment_trastuzumab=1 and treatment_trastuzumab=0 in the full cohort.
Mean pfs_months differs between patients with treatment_olaparib=1 and treatment_olaparib=0 in the full cohort.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS months: treatment_tamoxifen=1 -> 4.723 vs treatment_tamoxifen=0 -> 4.680; diff=0.043, t-test p=0.0769
Mean PFS months: treatment_palbociclib=1 -> 5.408 vs treatment_palbociclib=0 -> 4.310; diff=1.098, t-test p=0

Mean PFS months: treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan=1 -> 4.686 vs treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan=0 -> 4.694; diff=-0.007, t-test p=0.8461
Mean PFS months: treatment_pembrolizumab=1 -> 4.630 vs treatment_pembrolizumab=0 -> 4.704; diff=-0.074, t-test p=0.01753

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among er_positive=1 patients, mean pfs_months is higher with treatment_tamoxifen=1 than =0.
Among er_positive=0 patients, mean pfs_months does not differ between treatment_tamoxifen=1 and =0.
Among her2_positive=1 patients, mean pfs_months is higher with treatment_trastuzumab=1 than =0.
Among her2_positive=0 patients, mean pfs_months does not differ between treatment_trastuzumab=1 and =0.
Among patients with brca1_mutation=1 or brca2_mutation=1, mean pfs_months is higher with treatment_olaparib=1 than =0.
Among patients with brca1_mutation=0 and brca2_mutation=0, mean pfs_months does not differ between treatment_olaparib=1 and =0.
Among er_positive=1 and her2_positive=0 patients, mean pfs_months is higher with treatment_palbociclib=1 than =0.
Among triple-negative (er_positive=0, pr_positive=0, her2_positive=0) patients, mean pfs_months is higher with treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan=1 than =0.
Among msi_high=1 patients, mean pfs_months is higher with treatment_pembrolizumab=1 than =0.

Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative linear correlation).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative linear correlation).
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative linear correlation).
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative linear correlation).

Higher tumor_size_cm is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative linear correlation).

Higher ast_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative linear correlation).
Higher alt_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative linear correlation).

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive treatment_tamoxifen-by-er_positive interaction on pfs_months: the benefit of treatment_tamoxifen is greater when er_positive=1 than when er_positive=0.
There is a positive treatment_tamoxifen-by-pr_positive interaction on pfs_months: the benefit of treatment_tamoxifen is greater when pr_positive=1 than when pr_positive=0.
There is a positive treatment_trastuzumab-by-her2_positive interaction on pfs_months: the benefit of treatment_trastuzumab is greater when her2_positive=1 than when her2_positive=0.
There is a positive treatment_trastuzumab-by-her2_amplification interaction on pfs_months: the benefit of treatment_trastuzumab is greater when her2_amplification=1 than when her2_amplification=0.
There is a positive treatment_olaparib-by-brca1_mutation interaction on pfs_months: the benefit of treatment_olaparib is greater when brca1_mutation=1 than when brca1_mutation=0.
There is a positive treatment_olaparib-by-brca2_mutation interaction on pfs_months: the benefit of treatment_olaparib is greater when brca2_mutation=1 than when brca2_mutation=0.
There is a positive treatment_palbociclib-by-er_positive interaction on pfs_months: the benefit of treatment_palbociclib is greater when er_positive=1 than when er_positive=0.
There is a positive treatment_pembrolizumab-by-msi_high interaction on pfs_months: the benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab is greater when msi_high=1 than when msi_high=0.
There is a positive treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan-by-her2_low interaction on pfs_months: the benefit of treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan is greater when her2_low=1 than when her2_low=0.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_tamoxifen*er_positive: interaction coef=-0.0582, p=0.2701

After adjusting for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, tumor_size_cm, nlr, crp_mg_l and prior_lines_of_therapy, treatment_tamoxifen=1 is associated with longer pfs_months.

After adjusting for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, tumor_size_cm, nlr, crp_mg_l and prior_lines_of_therapy, treatment_palbociclib=1 is associated with longer pfs_months.

After adjusting for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, tumor_size_cm, nlr, crp_mg_l and prior_lines_of_therapy, treatment_trastuzumab=1 is associated with longer pfs_months.

After adjusting for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, tumor_size_cm, nlr, crp_mg_l and prior_lines_of_therapy, treatment_olaparib=1 is associated with longer pfs_months.

After adjusting for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, tumor_size_cm, nlr, crp_mg_l and prior_lines_of_therapy, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan=1 is associated with longer pfs_months.

After adjusting for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, tumor_size_cm, nlr, crp_mg_l and prior_lines_of_therapy, treatment_pembrolizumab=1 is associated with longer pfs_months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After multivariable adjustment within er_positive=1, treatment_tamoxifen=1 is associated with longer pfs_months.
After multivariable adjustment within her2_positive=1, treatment_trastuzumab=1 is associated with longer pfs_months.
After multivariable adjustment within BRCA1/2-mutated patients, treatment_olaparib=1 is associated with longer pfs_months.
After multivariable adjustment within er_positive=1 and her2_positive=0, treatment_palbociclib=1 is associated with longer pfs_months.
After multivariable adjustment within triple-negative patients, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan=1 is associated with longer pfs_months.
After multivariable adjustment within msi_high=1, treatment_pembrolizumab=1 is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Within er_positive == 1, adjusted coef(treatment_tamoxifen)=0.0029, p=0.8773, n=34886
Within her2_positive == 1, adjusted coef(treatment_trastuzumab)=0.0125, p=0.1845, n=9060
Within msi_high == 1, adjusted coef(treatment_pembrolizumab)=0.1426, p=0.3425, n=498

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for clinical covariates (age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, tumor_size_cm, prior_lines_of_therapy), the treatment_tamoxifen-by-er_positive interaction effect on pfs_months is positive.

After adjusting for clinical covariates (age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, tumor_size_cm, prior_lines_of_therapy), the treatment_tamoxifen-by-pr_positive interaction effect on pfs_months is positive.

After adjusting for clinical covariates (age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, tumor_size_cm, prior_lines_of_therapy), the treatment_trastuzumab-by-her2_positive interaction effect on pfs_months is positive.

After adjusting for clinical covariates (age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, tumor_size_cm, prior_lines_of_therapy), the treatment_trastuzumab-by-her2_amplification interaction effect on pfs_months is positive.

After adjusting for clinical covariates (age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, tumor_size_cm, prior_lines_of_therapy), the treatment_olaparib-by-brca1_mutation interaction effect on pfs_months is positive.

After adjusting for clinical covariates (age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, tumor_size_cm, prior_lines_of_therapy), the treatment_olaparib-by-brca2_mutation interaction effect on pfs_months is positive.

After adjusting for clinical covariates (age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, tumor_size_cm, prior_lines_of_therapy), the treatment_palbociclib-by-er_positive interaction effect on pfs_months is positive.

After adjusting for clinical covariates (age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, tumor_size_cm, prior_lines_of_therapy), the treatment_pembrolizumab-by-msi_high interaction effect on pfs_months is positive.

After adjusting for clinical covariates (age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, tumor_size_cm, prior_lines_of_therapy), the treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan-by-her2_low interaction effect on pfs_months is positive.
Among her2_low=1 patients, mean pfs_months is higher with treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan=1 than =0.
Among her2_amplification=1 patients, mean pfs_months is higher with treatment_trastuzumab=1 than =0.
There is a positive treatment_palbociclib by pik3ca_mutation interaction on pfs_months.

subset her2_amplification; ttest pfs by treatment_trastuzumab

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among postmenopausal=1 patients, mean pfs_months is higher with treatment_tamoxifen=1 than =0.
There is a positive treatment_tamoxifen by postmenopausal interaction on pfs_months: tamoxifen benefit is larger in postmenopausal=1 vs =0.
There is a positive treatment_tamoxifen by age_years interaction on pfs_months (greater tamoxifen benefit in older patients).
There is a negative treatment_pembrolizumab by ecog_ps interaction on pfs_months (smaller pembrolizumab benefit at higher ECOG).

analyses.code: subset postmenopausal; ttest pfs by treatment_tamoxifen
analyses.result_summary: Postmeno: tam=4.702 vs none=4.676; diff=0.026, p=0.3992

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a negative treatment_tamoxifen by has_brain_mets interaction on pfs_months (smaller treatment_tamoxifen benefit when brain mets are present).
There is a negative treatment_palbociclib by has_brain_mets interaction on pfs_months (smaller treatment_palbociclib benefit when brain mets are present).
There is a negative treatment_trastuzumab by has_brain_mets interaction on pfs_months (smaller treatment_trastuzumab benefit when brain mets are present).
There is a negative treatment_olaparib by has_brain_mets interaction on pfs_months (smaller treatment_olaparib benefit when brain mets are present).
There is a negative treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan by has_brain_mets interaction on pfs_months (smaller treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan benefit when brain mets are present).
There is a negative treatment_pembrolizumab by has_brain_mets interaction on pfs_months (smaller treatment_pembrolizumab benefit when brain mets are present).
There is a negative treatment_tamoxifen by stage_iv interaction on pfs_months (smaller treatment_tamoxifen benefit in stage IV vs earlier).
There is a negative treatment_palbociclib by stage_iv interaction on pfs_months (smaller treatment_palbociclib benefit in stage IV vs earlier).
There is a negative treatment_trastuzumab by stage_iv interaction on pfs_months (smaller treatment_trastuzumab benefit in stage IV vs earlier).
There is a negative treatment_olaparib by stage_iv interaction on pfs_months (smaller treatment_olaparib benefit in stage IV vs earlier).
There is a negative treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan by stage_iv interaction on pfs_months (smaller treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan benefit in stage IV vs earlier).
There is a negative treatment_pembrolizumab by stage_iv interaction on pfs_months (smaller treatment_pembrolizumab benefit in stage IV vs earlier).
Mean pfs_months is lower in tnbc=1 (er_positive=0 & pr_positive=0 & her2_positive=0) vs tnbc=0 patients.
Mean pfs_months is higher in luminal-A-like patients (er_positive=1 & her2_positive=0 & ki67_pct<20) vs others.
Mean pfs_months differs between BRCA1/2-mutated and non-mutated patients overall.
Mean pfs_months is lower in tp53_mutation=1 vs =0.

Among brca2_mutation=1 patients, mean pfs_months is higher with treatment_olaparib=1 than =0.
Proportion of sex_female=1 patients in this breast cancer cohort exceeds 0.5.
There is a positive treatment_trastuzumab by sex_female interaction on pfs_months (greater trastuzumab benefit in females).
Among er_positive=1 and postmenopausal=1 patients, mean pfs_months is higher with treatment_tamoxifen=1 than =0.
Among er_positive=1 and postmenopausal=0 patients, mean pfs_months is higher with treatment_tamoxifen=1 than =0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive treatment_pembrolizumab by msi_high interaction on pfs_months (greater benefit at higher msi_high).
There is a positive treatment_pembrolizumab by tp53_mutation interaction on pfs_months (greater benefit at higher tp53_mutation).
There is a positive treatment_pembrolizumab by smoking_pack_years interaction on pfs_months (greater benefit at higher smoking_pack_years).
Within er_positive=1 and postmenopausal=1 patients, after multivariable adjustment, treatment_tamoxifen=1 is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within HER2+ or HER2-amplified patients, after adjustment, treatment_trastuzumab=1 is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within BRCA1/2-mutated patients, after adjustment, treatment_olaparib=1 is associated with longer pfs_months.
